paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 45 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 23 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 56 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522) — cleared all overdue.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $40,227 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** Down to 2 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $27,235 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

241 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **121 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. **$105,653 in payments going out this week** across 41 tasks — make sure funds are available. $59,821 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is carrying 4 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue — oldest first. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
